tEn: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
tZh: Gated DeltaNet-2：在线性注意力中解耦擦除与写入
sEn: Gated DeltaNet-2 decouples erase and write gates in linear attention, achieving state-of-the-art performance on long-context tasks.
sZh: Gated DeltaNet-2 在线性注意力中解耦擦除门和写入门，在长上下文任务上达到最优性能。
absEn: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) sharpens forgetting with channel-wise decay. But the active edit still uses a single scalar gate to control two different things: how much old content to erase on the key side and how much new content to commit on the value side. We introduce Gated DeltaNet-2, which generalizes both Gated DeltaNet and KDA by inheriting adaptive forgetting and channel-wise decay while addressing their shared limitation, the scalar tie between erasing and writing. Gated Delta Rule-2 separates these roles with a channel-wise erase gate b_t and a channel-wise write gate w_t, reducing to KDA when both gates collapse to the same scalar and to Gated DeltaNet when the decay also collapses. We derive a fast-weight update view, a chunkwise WY algorithm with channel-wise decay absorbed into asymmetric erase factors, and a gate-aware backward pass that preserves efficient parallel training. At 1.3B parameters trained on 100B FineWeb-Edu tokens, Gated DeltaNet-2 achieves the strongest overall results among Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 variants across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, and retrieval. Its advantage is most pronounced on long-context RULER needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks, where it improves the evaluated multi-key retrieval setting and remains strong in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2.
absZh: 线性注意力用固定大小的循环状态替代了softmax注意力的无限缓存，将序列混合降至线性时间，解码内存恒定。难点不仅在于遗忘什么，更在于如何编辑压缩记忆而不扰乱已有关联。Delta规则模型在写入新值前减去当前读取，Kimi Delta注意力（KDA）通过通道级衰减增强遗忘。但活跃编辑仍使用单一标量门控制两件事：键侧擦除多少旧内容，值侧提交多少新内容。我们提出Gated DeltaNet-2，它继承了自适应遗忘和通道级衰减，同时解决了擦除与写入之间的标量耦合问题。Gated Delta Rule-2通过通道级擦除门b_t和写入门w_t分离这两个角色，当两门退化为同一标量时简化为KDA，当衰减也退化时简化为Gated DeltaNet。我们推导了快速权重更新视角、将通道级衰减吸收为非对称擦除因子的分块WY算法，以及保持高效并行训练的门感知反向传播。在1.3B参数、100B FineWeb-Edu token训练下，Gated DeltaNet-2在语言建模、常识推理和检索任务中，整体结果优于Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA和Mamba-3变体。其优势在长上下文RULER针包基准测试中最为显著，改进了多键检索设置，并在循环和混合设置中均保持强劲性能。代码见 https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2。

items.en: Abstract: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) sharpens forgetting with channel-wise decay. But the active edit still uses a single scalar gate to control two different things, how much old content to erase on the key side and how much new content to commit on the value side. We introduce Gated DeltaNet-2, which generalizes both Gated DeltaNet and KDA by inheriting adaptive forgetting and channel-wise decay while addressing their shared limitation, the scalar tie between erasing and writing. Gated Delta Rule-2 separates these roles with a channel-wise erase gate 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} and a channel-wise write gate 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t}, reducing to KDA when both gates collapse to the same scalar and to Gated DeltaNet when the decay also collapses. We derive a fast-weight update view, a chunkwise WY algorithm with channel-wise decay absorbed into asymmetric erase factors, and a gate-aware backward pass that preserves efficient parallel training. At 1.3B parameters trained on 100B FineWeb-Edu tokens, Gated DeltaNet-2 achieves the strongest overall results among Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 variants across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, and retrieval. Its advantage is most pronounced on long-context RULER needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks, where it improves the evaluated multi-key retrieval setting and remains strong in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Code: https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2
items.zh: 摘要：线性注意力将softmax注意力的无限缓存替换为固定大小的循环状态，将序列混合降至线性时间，解码降至恒定内存。难点不仅在于遗忘什么，还在于如何编辑这个压缩记忆而不打乱现有关联。Delta规则模型在写入新值前减去当前读取，而Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) 通过通道级衰减增强了遗忘。但主动编辑仍使用单个标量门控来控制两件不同的事：在键侧擦除多少旧内容，以及在值侧提交多少新内容。我们提出Gated DeltaNet-2，它通过继承自适应遗忘和通道级衰减，同时解决其共享限制（擦除与写入之间的标量绑定），推广了Gated DeltaNet和KDA。Gated Delta Rule-2用通道级擦除门𝒃t和通道级写入门𝐰t分离这些角色，当两个门都坍缩为同一标量时退化为KDA，当衰减也坍缩时退化为Gated DeltaNet。我们推导了快速权重更新视角、一个将通道级衰减吸收为非对称擦除因子的分块WY算法，以及一个保持高效并行训练的门感知反向传播。在1.3B参数、100B FineWeb-Edu token上训练后，Gated DeltaNet-2在语言建模、常识推理和检索中取得了优于Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA和Mamba-3变体的最强整体结果。其优势在长上下文RULER大海捞针基准上最为显著，在评估的多键检索设置中有所提升，并在循环和混合设置中均保持强劲。代码：https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2

items.en: The Transformer architecture has become the dominant backbone for large language models because self-attention gives each token direct access to its history and maps naturally to parallel training on modern accelerators. Its cost, however, still grows quadratically with sequence length. This cost becomes a central obstacle for long-context training and high-throughput inference, where the model must repeatedly process histories that are much longer than the dimension of a single attention head.
items.zh: Transformer架构已成为大语言模型的主导骨干，因为自注意力使每个token能直接访问其历史，并自然地映射到现代加速器上的并行训练。然而，其成本仍随序列长度二次增长。这一成本成为长上下文训练和高吞吐量推理的主要障碍，此时模型必须反复处理比单个注意力头维度长得多的历史。

items.en: Linear recurrent attention takes a different path. It replaces the explicit attention matrix with a fixed-size recurrent state, turning sequence mixing into a linear-time recurrence whose memory does not grow with context length [1]. The appeal is clear, but so is the constraint. The state is a compressed key-value memory, and long contexts force many associations to share the same finite space, making exact retrieval difficult [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]. Recent work has improved this memory by giving the recurrence more control over what persists. Mamba-2 uses data-dependent decay to regulate the memory horizon [8]. DeltaNet replaces additive writes with the delta rule, enabling targeted overwrite of the association addressed by the current key [9, 2, 10]. Gated DeltaNet combines the delta rule with a learned decay gate, giving the state both global forgetting and targeted editing [11]. Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) refines the decay side with channel-wise forgetting over the key dimension [12]. In parallel, Mamba-3 advances the state-space route through exponential-trapezoidal discretization, complex-valued state transitions, and a multi-input, multi-output formulation for stronger and more efficient recurrence [13]. These advances have pushed recurrent linear models forward, while making the remaining bottleneck in delta-rule memory more visible. The active edit still uses one scalar gate to control both erasing old content and writing new content.
items.zh: 线性循环注意力走了一条不同的路。它用固定大小的循环状态替换显式注意力矩阵，将序列混合转化为线性时间循环，其内存不随上下文长度增长[1]。其吸引力显而易见，但约束也同样明显。状态是一个压缩的键值记忆，长上下文迫使许多关联共享同一有限空间，使得精确检索变得困难[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]。近期工作通过赋予循环更多对持久性的控制改进了这一记忆。Mamba-2使用数据依赖的衰减来调节记忆范围[8]。DeltaNet用delta规则替代加法写入，实现对当前键所寻址关联的针对性覆盖[9, 2, 10]。Gated DeltaNet结合delta规则与学习到的衰减门，赋予状态全局遗忘和针对性编辑能力[11]。Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) 通过键维度上的通道级遗忘细化了衰减侧[12]。同时，Mamba-3通过指数梯形离散化、复值状态转移以及多输入多输出公式，推进了状态空间路线，以实现更强更高效的循环[13]。这些进展推动了循环线性模型向前发展，同时使delta规则记忆中的剩余瓶颈更加明显：主动编辑仍使用一个标量门控来控制擦除旧内容和写入新内容。

items.en: We propose Gated DeltaNet-2, a recurrent attention layer that decouples erase and write in the delta rule. The scalar tie is a modeling restriction because erasing and writing act on different axes of the state. Erasing is a key-side operation that decides which coordinates of the old read should be removed, while writing is a value-side operation that decides which coordinates of the incoming value should be committed. Gated DeltaNet-2 preserves KDA’s channel-wise decay, but replaces the tied scalar delta gate with a channel-wise erase gate on the key axis and a channel-wise write gate on the value axis. The model can clear broad context through decay, remove selected stale associations through erase, and insert only the value channels that should persist through write. When the erase and write gates are tied to the same scalar, Gated DeltaNet-2 recovers KDA. If the decay is tied to a scalar as well, it recovers Gated DeltaNet.
items.zh: 我们提出Gated DeltaNet-2，一种在delta规则中解耦擦除和写入的循环注意力层。标量绑定是一种建模限制，因为擦除和写入作用于状态的不同轴。擦除是键侧操作，决定旧读取的哪些坐标应被移除；而写入是值侧操作，决定传入值的哪些坐标应被提交。Gated DeltaNet-2保留了KDA的通道级衰减，但将绑定的标量delta门替换为键轴上的通道级擦除门和值轴上的通道级写入门。模型可以通过衰减清除广泛上下文，通过擦除移除选定的过时关联，并通过写入仅插入应持久化的值通道。当擦除门和写入门绑定到同一标量时，Gated DeltaNet-2恢复为KDA。如果衰减也绑定到标量，则恢复为Gated DeltaNet。

items.en: This change preserves the efficient training path. By absorbing cumulative channel-wise decay into the rank-one erase factors, the recurrence admits a compact WY form with the same high-level chunkwise structure used by efficient delta-rule kernels [14, 15, 16, 17]. The main text gives the modeling equations and the chunkwise algorithm. Kernel-level details are deferred to the supplement.
items.zh: 这一改变保留了高效训练路径。通过将累积的通道级衰减吸收到秩一擦除因子中，循环可采用紧凑的WY形式，其高层分块结构与高效delta规则内核使用的结构相同[14, 15, 16, 17]。正文给出建模方程和分块算法。内核级细节见补充材料。

items.en: Empirically, Gated DeltaNet-2 improves the recurrent attention frontier, with the clearest gains on long-context retrieval. On the RULER needle-in-a-haystack tasks in Table 3, it remains strong as context length grows and is especially effective on the evaluated multi-key case where a fixed-size state must separate competing associations. This advantage also appears in real-world recall, where Gated DeltaNet-2 gives the strongest overall retrieval profile in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Together with gains in language modeling, commonsense reasoning and in-context retrieval, these results suggest that decoupling the active memory edit directly targets the main pressure point of fixed-state recurrence, interference among many compressed associations.
items.zh: 实验上，Gated DeltaNet-2改进了循环注意力前沿，在长上下文检索上增益最为明显。在表3的RULER大海捞针任务中，随着上下文长度增长，它保持强劲，并在评估的多键情况下尤为有效，此时固定大小状态必须分离竞争关联。这一优势也出现在真实世界召回中，Gated DeltaNet-2在循环和混合设置中均给出最强的整体检索轮廓。结合语言建模、常识推理和上下文检索中的增益，这些结果表明解耦主动记忆编辑直接针对固定状态循环的主要压力点：众多压缩关联之间的干扰。

items.en: KDA lets each key channel decay at its own rate and retains the efficient WY-based chunkwise algorithm of DeltaNet [14, 10]. Yet the active gate βt\beta_{t} is still a single scalar. It controls both how much old content is erased from the read direction and how much new value is written. Gated DeltaNet-2 starts from this remaining tie.

items.en: KDA refines Gated DeltaNet by making the decay channel-wise, but the scalar βt\beta_{t} in Eq. 7 still carries two decisions that need not agree. One decision lives on the key side and determines which coordinates of the current read should be erased. The other lives on the value side and determines which coordinates of the candidate value should be written. Treating both decisions as one scalar is a restriction of the update, not a requirement of the delta rule.

items.en: We refer to Eq. 10 as Gated Delta Rule-2. The output is 𝒐t=𝐒t⊤​𝒒t{\bm{o}}_{t}={\mathbf{S}}_{t}^{\top}{\bm{q}}_{t}. The left factor of the erase matrix remains 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t}, which preserves the write direction of the delta rule. The right factor becomes 𝒃t⊙𝒌t{\bm{b}}_{t}\odot{\bm{k}}_{t}, which makes the read direction channel selective. The write term becomes 𝒌t​𝒛t⊤{\bm{k}}_{t}{\bm{z}}_{t}^{\top}, which makes the value update channel selective.
items.zh: 我们将公式 10 称为门控 Delta 规则-2。输出为 𝒐t=𝐒t⊤​𝒒t{\bm{o}}_{t}={\mathbf{S}}_{t}^{\top}{\bm{q}}_{t}。擦除矩阵的左因子保持为 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t}，这保留了 delta 规则的写入方向。右因子变为 𝒃t⊙𝒌t{\bm{b}}_{t}\odot{\bm{k}}_{t}，这使得读取方向具有通道选择性。写入项变为 𝒌t​𝒛t⊤{\bm{k}}_{t}{\bm{z}}_{t}^{\top}，这使得值更新具有通道选择性。

items.en: Gated Delta Rule-2 recovers KDA exactly when 𝒃t=βt​𝟏dk{\bm{b}}_{t}=\beta_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{k}} and 𝐰t=βt​𝟏dv\mathbf{w}_{t}=\beta_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{v}}. It recovers Gated DeltaNet by further setting 𝜶t=αt​𝟏dk{\bm{\alpha}}_{t}=\alpha_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{k}}. Thus the model preserves the known scalar-gated updates as tied subspaces, while learning outside those subspaces when erase and write require different channel structure.
items.zh: 当 𝒃t=βt​𝟏dk{\bm{b}}_{t}=\beta_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{k}} 且 𝐰t=βt​𝟏dv\mathbf{w}_{t}=\beta_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{v}} 时，门控 Delta 规则-2 精确恢复 KDA。进一步设置 𝜶t=αt​𝟏dk{\bm{\alpha}}_{t}=\alpha_{t}\mathbf{1}_{d_{k}} 则恢复 Gated DeltaNet。因此，该模型将已知的标量门控更新保留为绑定子空间，同时在擦除和写入需要不同通道结构时学习这些子空间之外的内容。

items.en: In practice this decay activation is computed in fp32 before the kernel consumes it, which avoids precision loss in the cumulative log-decay. We also support the negative-eigenvalue variant of [20] by scaling only the erase gate to [0,2]dk[0,2]^{d_{k}}. The write gate remains in [0,1]dv[0,1]^{d_{v}} because the spectral effect concerns the state transition, not the value magnitude.
items.zh: 在实践中，此衰减激活在 fp32 中计算，然后由内核使用，这避免了累积对数衰减中的精度损失。我们还通过将擦除门缩放到 [0,2]dk[0,2]^{d_{k}} 来支持 [20] 的负特征值变体。写入门保持在 [0,1]dv[0,1]^{d_{v}}，因为谱效应涉及状态转换，而非值幅度。

items.en: We can interpret Gated Delta Rule-2 as an online update of a fast-weight memory state [21]. The state 𝐒t{\mathbf{S}}_{t} stores transient key-value associations. At each token, the model first forms a decayed state 𝐒¯t=𝐃t​𝐒t−1\bar{{\mathbf{S}}}_{t}={\mathbf{D}}_{t}{\mathbf{S}}_{t-1}, reads the old content through the gated erase direction 𝒆t{\bm{e}}_{t}, and writes a correction toward the gated value target 𝒛t{\bm{z}}_{t}.
items.zh: 我们可以将门控 Delta 规则-2 解释为快速权重记忆状态 [21] 的在线更新。状态 𝐒t{\mathbf{S}}_{t} 存储瞬态键值关联。在每个令牌处，模型首先形成衰减状态 𝐒¯t=𝐃t​𝐒t−1\bar{{\mathbf{S}}}_{t}={\mathbf{D}}_{t}{\mathbf{S}}_{t-1}，通过门控擦除方向 𝒆t{\bm{e}}_{t} 读取旧内容，并向门控值目标 𝒛t{\bm{z}}_{t} 写入修正。

The erase gate enters through row rr of 𝐄¯\bar{{\mathbf{E}}} as 𝜸r⊙(𝒃r⊙𝒌r)\bm{\gamma}_{r}\odot({\bm{b}}_{r}\odot{\bm{k}}_{r}). items.en: For scalar-gated delta rules, a factor βr\beta_{r} can be moved outside the dot products that accumulate the gradient of 𝐀{\mathbf{A}}. That shortcut breaks for Gated Delta Rule-2. The write side contains a different diagonal gate over value channels, and the erase side contains a different diagonal gate over key channels. Therefore the gate factors must be present at the accumulation sites. Let 𝐁{\mathbf{B}} and 𝐖{\mathbf{W}} contain rows 𝒃r⊤{\bm{b}}_{r}^{\top} and 𝐰r⊤\mathbf{w}_{r}^{\top}, respectively, and let 𝜸\bm{\gamma} denote the row-stacked cumulative-decay vectors. Then

items.en: From there, gradients to 𝐁{\mathbf{B}}, 𝐖{\mathbf{W}}, 𝐊{\mathbf{K}}, 𝐕{\mathbf{V}}, and the cumulative decay follow by ordinary elementwise products and reverse cumulative sums. This gate-aware accumulation is the main mathematical change required for training Gated Delta Rule-2. The remaining backward kernels retain the same matrix shapes as KDA and can reuse the same state and output vector-Jacobian product structure.

items.en: Gated DeltaNet-2 is used as the recurrent token mixer in a standard Transformer-style block. Fig. 1 (right) shows its block design. For the Gated Delta Rule-2 in Eq. 10, {𝒒t,𝒌t,𝒗t}\{{\bm{q}}_{t},{\bm{k}}_{t},{\bm{v}}_{t}\} are produced by linear projection, short causal convolution, and SiLU, with L2 normalization applied to 𝒒t{\bm{q}}_{t} and 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t} for stability. Separate branches produce the channel-wise decay 𝜶t{\bm{\alpha}}_{t}, erase gate 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t}, and write gate 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t}. The recurrent output is RMS-normalized, multiplied by a separate SiLU output gate, and projected back to the model dimension. Throughout the paper, 𝒈\bm{g} denotes the log-decay tensor in Eq. 12, not the output gate. With grouped value heads, 𝒒{\bm{q}}, 𝒌{\bm{k}}, the log-decay tensor 𝒈\bm{g}, and 𝒃{\bm{b}} are repeated across value-head groups, while 𝒗{\bm{v}} and 𝐰\mathbf{w} remain on the value-head axis.
items.zh: 门控 DeltaNet-2 用作标准 Transformer 风格块中的循环令牌混合器。图 1（右）展示了其块设计。对于方程 10 中的门控 Delta 规则-2，{𝒒t,𝒌t,𝒗t}\{{\bm{q}}_{t},{\bm{k}}_{t},{\bm{v}}_{t}\} 通过线性投影、短因果卷积和 SiLU 生成，并对 𝒒t{\bm{q}}_{t} 和 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t} 应用 L2 归一化以保证稳定性。独立分支产生通道级衰减 𝜶t{\bm{\alpha}}_{t}、擦除门 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} 和写入门 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t}。循环输出经过 RMS 归一化，乘以独立的 SiLU 输出门，并投影回模型维度。在整篇论文中，𝒈\bm{g} 表示方程 12 中的对数衰减张量，而非输出门。使用分组值头时，𝒒{\bm{q}}、𝒌{\bm{k}}、对数衰减张量 𝒈\bm{g} 和 𝒃{\bm{b}} 在值头组间重复，而 𝒗{\bm{v}} 和 𝐰\mathbf{w} 保持在值头轴上。

items.en: We train both recurrent and hybrid models. The recurrent model stacks Gated DeltaNet-2 token mixers and MLPs under the standard residual block, isolating the fixed-state memory of Eq. 10. The hybrid model inserts Sliding-Window Attention (SWA) after the recurrent mixer, as shown in Fig. 1 (left). A repeated cell contains Gated DeltaNet-2, an MLP, SWA, and another MLP. Gated DeltaNet-2 compresses long histories into constant-size memory, while SWA handles exact local interactions such as short shifts, comparisons, and local retrieval. With a fixed window, the hybrid retains linear sequence scaling and a bounded attention cache, following the recurrent attention hybrid design pattern [24, 25].
items.zh: 我们训练了循环模型和混合模型。循环模型在标准残差块中堆叠门控 DeltaNet-2 令牌混合器和 MLP，隔离了方程 10 的固定状态记忆。混合模型在循环混合器后插入滑动窗口注意力（SWA），如图 1（左）所示。一个重复单元包含门控 DeltaNet-2、MLP、SWA 和另一个 MLP。门控 DeltaNet-2 将长历史压缩为固定大小记忆，而 SWA 处理精确的局部交互，如短距离移位、比较和局部检索。使用固定窗口时，混合模型保持线性序列缩放和有界注意力缓存，遵循循环注意力混合设计模式 [24, 25]。

items.en: We evaluate each recurrent family in two forms, a recurrent-only model and a hybrid model that pairs the same recurrent token mixer with sliding-window attention as described in Section 3.5. For Mamba-3, we include both SISO and MIMO variants and use MIMO rank R=4R=4 following [13]. All models are trained with the same recipe. Unless stated otherwise, each model has 1.3B parameters and is trained on 100B tokens from FineWeb-Edu [26]. We use AdamW with peak learning rate 4×10−44\times 10^{-4}, weight decay 0.10.1, gradient clipping at 1.01.0, cosine decay, a 1B-token warm-up, and a global batch size of 0.5M tokens. The training length is 4K tokens, and hybrid models use a 2K sliding-window attention size. Evaluation details are given in the appendix.
items.zh: 我们以两种形式评估每个循环家族：纯循环模型和混合模型，后者将相同的循环令牌混合器与第 3.5 节所述的滑动窗口注意力配对。对于 Mamba-3，我们包含 SISO 和 MIMO 变体，并使用 MIMO 秩 R=4R=4，遵循 [13]。所有模型使用相同配方训练。除非另有说明，每个模型有 1.3B 参数，并在 FineWeb-Edu [26] 的 100B 令牌上训练。我们使用 AdamW，峰值学习率 4×10−44\times 10^{-4}，权重衰减 0.10.1，梯度裁剪 1.01.0，余弦衰减，1B 令牌预热，全局批次大小 0.5M 令牌。训练长度为 4K 令牌，混合模型使用 2K 滑动窗口注意力大小。评估细节见附录。

items.en: Fig. 2 reports single H100 training throughput for the hybrid 1.3B models under a fixed token budget. Gated DeltaNet-2 preserves the near-flat scaling profile of recurrent mixers as sequence length grows, dropping only mildly from 38.0 to 36.1 Kt/s, while the Transformer degrades sharply. Relative to KDA, the small gap reflects the added channel-wise erase and write gates. Thus Gated DeltaNet-2 retains practical training efficiency while paying a modest constant cost for finer memory control.
items.zh: 图 2 报告了在固定令牌预算下混合 1.3B 模型的单 H100 训练吞吐量。门控 DeltaNet-2 保持了循环混合器随序列长度增长近乎平坦的缩放曲线，仅从 38.0 轻微下降到 36.1 Kt/s，而 Transformer 急剧下降。相对于 KDA，小差距反映了增加的通道级擦除和写入门。因此门控 DeltaNet-2 在保持实际训练效率的同时，为更精细的记忆控制付出了适度的恒定代价。

items.en: Efficient sequence models replace quadratic self-attention with recurrent or linear-time token mixers that maintain a fixed-size state. Early structured state-space and recurrent models used mostly data-independent transitions [38, 39, 40, 16], while Mamba and Mamba-2 introduced data-dependent selective dynamics and the SSD framework [41, 8]. Gated linear attention and related linear RNNs further improve memory control with learned decay gates [17, 42]. Delta-rule models take a complementary fast-weight view, where the recurrent state is updated by correcting the current read before writing the new value, improving associative memory over Hebbian-style accumulation [43, 44, 45, 10]. Gated DeltaNet adds adaptive forgetting to this update [11], and KDA strengthens it with channel-wise decay and an efficient chunkwise algorithm, but still uses a scalar βt\beta_{t} to control both erasing and writing [12]. Mamba-3 advances the SSM line instead, using exponential-trapezoidal discretization, complex-valued transitions implemented through data-dependent rotations, and a MIMO formulation for stronger modeling at efficient decoding latency [13]. Our work is complementary to these directions. Gated DeltaNet-2 keeps the delta-rule fast-weight structure of GDN and KDA, but replaces the tied scalar update strength with a channel-wise erase gate 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} and a channel-wise write gate 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t}. This recovers KDA when both gates are tied to the same scalar, while allowing old content and new values to be controlled along different channel patterns.
items.zh: 高效序列模型用循环或线性时间令牌混合器替代二次自注意力，这些混合器维护固定大小的状态。早期结构化状态空间和循环模型主要使用数据无关的转移 [38, 39, 40, 16]，而 Mamba 和 Mamba-2 引入了数据依赖的选择性动力学和 SSD 框架 [41, 8]。门控线性注意力和相关线性 RNN 通过学习衰减门进一步改进了记忆控制 [17, 42]。Delta 规则模型采用互补的快权重视角，其中循环状态通过先修正当前读取再写入新值来更新，改进了 Hebbian 式累积的联想记忆 [43, 44, 45, 10]。门控 DeltaNet 为此更新添加了自适应遗忘 [11]，KDA 通过通道级衰减和高效分块算法增强了它，但仍使用标量 βt\beta_{t} 控制擦除和写入 [12]。Mamba-3 则推进了 SSM 路线，使用指数梯形离散化、通过数据依赖旋转实现的复值转移，以及 MIMO 公式，以高效解码延迟实现更强建模 [13]。我们的工作与这些方向互补。门控 DeltaNet-2 保留了 GDN 和 KDA 的 delta 规则快权重结构，但将绑定的标量更新强度替换为通道级擦除门 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} 和通道级写入门 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t}。当两个门绑定到同一标量时，它恢复为 KDA，同时允许旧内容和新值沿不同通道模式被控制。

items.en: We introduced Gated DeltaNet-2, a delta-rule recurrent attention layer that decouples the active memory edit into channel-wise erase and write decisions. The erase gate 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} selects which key-side coordinates of the decayed state are read and removed, while the write gate 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t} selects which value-side coordinates are committed. This removes the scalar βt\beta_{t} tie in Gated DeltaNet and KDA, recovers both as special cases, and preserves efficient chunkwise training through a WY form with gate-aware kernels. Under matched 1.3B training, Gated DeltaNet-2 improves the recurrent and hybrid frontier across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, synthetic retrieval, and real-world recall, while adding only a small constant throughput overhead. Ablations show that both gates contribute, with the erase gate accounting for most of the gain.
items.zh: 我们引入了门控 DeltaNet-2，一种 delta 规则循环注意力层，将主动记忆编辑解耦为通道级擦除和写入决策。擦除门 𝒃t{\bm{b}}_{t} 选择衰减状态的哪些键侧坐标被读取和移除，而写入门 𝐰t\mathbf{w}_{t} 选择哪些值侧坐标被提交。这消除了门控 DeltaNet 和 KDA 中的标量 βt\beta_{t} 绑定，将两者恢复为特例，并通过 WY 形式和门感知内核保持了高效的分块训练。在匹配的 1.3B 训练下，门控 DeltaNet-2 在语言建模、常识推理、合成检索和真实世界召回方面改进了循环和混合前沿，同时仅增加了少量恒定吞吐量开销。消融实验表明两个门都有贡献，其中擦除门贡献了大部分增益。

items.zh: 在KDA中，标量β_r同时乘以值右侧和擦除右侧。对于一行，来自写入辅助的对d𝐀的贡献可分解为

items.en: The scalar factor can be applied after the dot product. Gated DeltaNet-2 replaces βs​𝒗s\beta_{s}{\bm{v}}_{s} by 𝐰s⊙𝒗s\mathbf{w}_{s}\odot{\bm{v}}_{s}. Since 𝐰s\mathbf{w}_{s} is a different diagonal operator for every row, there is no row scalar or column scalar that can recover
items.zh: 标量因子可在点积后应用。Gated DeltaNet-2将β_s𝒗_s替换为𝐰_s⊙𝒗_s。由于𝐰_s对每一行是不同的对角算子，不存在行标量或列标量可以从d𝐮_r𝒗_s^⊤恢复

items.en: from d​𝐮r​𝒗s⊤\mathrm{d}\mathbf{u}_{r}{\bm{v}}_{s}^{\top}. The erase side has the same issue with 𝒃s⊙𝒌s{\bm{b}}_{s}\odot{\bm{k}}_{s}. The gates must be baked into the dot products in Eq. 64 and Eq. 65.

full.sec: Appendix C Layer and kernel implementation
full.secZh: 附录C 层与内核实现

items.en: This appendix records the implementation choices needed to reproduce Gated DeltaNet-2. The main text keeps the Triton details brief. Here we describe the computation at the level of kernels and tensor shapes.
items.zh: 本附录记录了复现Gated DeltaNet-2所需的实现选择。正文对Triton细节描述简略。此处我们在内核和张量形状层面描述计算。

items.en: The layer computes short-convolutional projections for 𝒒{\bm{q}}, 𝒌{\bm{k}}, and 𝒗{\bm{v}}, followed by head reshaping. The erase and write gates are produced by independent projections,
items.zh: 该层计算𝒒、𝒌和𝒗的短卷积投影，随后进行头重塑。擦除门控和写入门控由独立投影产生，

items.en: The erase projection has shape dmodel→H​dkd_{\mathrm{model}}\to Hd_{k}. The write projection has shape dmodel→Hv​dvd_{\mathrm{model}}\to H_{v}d_{v}. If grouped value attention is used with Hv>HH_{v}>H, the key-side tensors 𝒒{\bm{q}}, 𝒌{\bm{k}}, the log-decay tensor 𝒈\bm{g}, and 𝒃{\bm{b}} are repeated across the value-head group, while 𝒗{\bm{v}} and 𝐰\mathbf{w} already live on the value-head axis.
items.zh: 擦除投影形状为d_model→Hd_k。写入投影形状为d_model→H_v d_v。如果使用分组值注意力且H_v>H，则键侧张量𝒒、𝒌、对数衰减张量𝒈和𝒃在值头组上重复，而𝒗和𝐰已位于值头轴上。

items.en: The log-decay is computed outside the kernel in fp32,
items.zh: 对数衰减在内核外以fp32计算，

items.en: The vector 𝐚\mathbf{a} is stored per key head and broadcast across the dkd_{k} channels of that head. The bias 𝜹\bm{\delta} is stored per key channel. The kernel consumes 𝒈t\bm{g}_{t} directly and forms the local cumulative sums in Eq. 30.
items.zh: 向量𝐚按键头存储，并在该头的d_k通道上广播。偏置𝜹按键通道存储。内核直接使用𝒈_t并形成方程30中的局部累积和。

items.en: If negative eigenvalues are enabled, only the erase gate is scaled by 22. This changes 𝒃t∈[0,1]dk{\bm{b}}_{t}\in[0,1]^{d_{k}} into 𝒃t∈[0,2]dk{\bm{b}}_{t}\in[0,2]^{d_{k}}. The write gate remains in [0,1]dv[0,1]^{d_{v}}.
items.zh: 如果启用负特征值，仅擦除门控乘以2。这将𝒃_t∈[0,1]^{d_k}变为𝒃_t∈[0,2]^{d_k}。写入门控保持为[0,1]^{d_v}。

items.en: The chunk size is fixed to C=64C=64. Each chunk is processed by the following steps.
items.zh: 块大小固定为C=64。每个块按以下步骤处理。

items.en: The first kernel forms the causal score matrix 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} and the strictly lower matrix 𝐓{\mathbf{T}}. The Gated DeltaNet-2 specific computation is the row factor of 𝐓{\mathbf{T}},
items.zh: 第一个内核形成因果得分矩阵𝐀_{qk}和严格下三角矩阵𝐓。Gated DeltaNet-2特有的计算是𝐓的行因子，

items.en: Thus the erase gate is multiplied into the key tile before the dot product. The score matrix 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} is unchanged apart from the same decay-normalized key factors.
items.zh: 因此擦除门控在点积前乘入键块。得分矩阵𝐀_{qk}除相同的衰减归一化键因子外保持不变。

items.en: The second kernel solves 𝐀=(𝐈+𝐓)−1{\mathbf{A}}=({\mathbf{I}}+{\mathbf{T}})^{-1} by forward substitution. It then exposes the same lower triangular inverse to both right hand sides. This is the compact WY step used in Eq. 34.
items.zh: 第二个核通过前向代入求解 𝐀=(𝐈+𝐓)−1{\mathbf{A}}=({\mathbf{I}}+{\mathbf{T}})^{-1}。然后它将相同的下三角逆矩阵暴露给两个右侧向量。这是式 34 中使用的紧凑 WY 步骤。

items.en: The implementation stores 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}} using the historical buffer name w because KDA used the same buffer for its erase-side auxiliary; this buffer is not the write-gate matrix 𝐖{\mathbf{W}}. The mathematical role is 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}} throughout this paper.
items.zh: 实现使用历史缓冲区名称 w 存储 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}}，因为 KDA 使用相同的缓冲区作为其擦除侧辅助；此缓冲区不是写门矩阵 𝐖{\mathbf{W}}。在本文中，其数学角色始终是 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}}。

items.en: The inter-chunk state recurrence consumes 𝐊tail{\mathbf{K}}_{\mathrm{tail}}, 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}}, and 𝐔{\mathbf{U}}, and applies Eq. 40. The output kernel consumes 𝐐γ{\mathbf{Q}}_{\gamma}, 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk}, and 𝐑=𝐔−𝐘𝐒0{\mathbf{R}}={\mathbf{U}}-{\mathbf{Y}}{\mathbf{S}}_{0}, and applies Eq. 44. These two kernels do not depend on how the gate factors were produced, so they share the same matrix shapes as KDA.
items.zh: 块间状态循环消耗 𝐊tail{\mathbf{K}}_{\mathrm{tail}}、𝐘{\mathbf{Y}} 和 𝐔{\mathbf{U}}，并应用式 40。输出核消耗 𝐐γ{\mathbf{Q}}_{\gamma}、𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} 和 𝐑=𝐔−𝐘𝐒0{\mathbf{R}}={\mathbf{U}}-{\mathbf{Y}}{\mathbf{S}}_{0}，并应用式 44。这两个核不依赖于门因子的产生方式，因此它们与 KDA 共享相同的矩阵形状。

items.en: The first backward kernel computes d​𝐀q​k\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} and the output-path contribution to d​𝐑\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{R}} from Eq. 53 and Eq. 54. It is structure-equivalent to the KDA output vector-Jacobian product because it only sees 𝐑{\mathbf{R}}.
items.zh: 第一个反向核根据式 53 和式 54 计算 d​𝐀q​k\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} 和输出路径对 d​𝐑\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{R}} 的贡献。它在结构上等价于 KDA 输出向量-雅可比积，因为它只看到 𝐑{\mathbf{R}}。

items.en: The second backward kernel propagates d​𝐒C\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{S}}_{C} through Eq. 51. It is also structure-equivalent to the KDA state vector-Jacobian product because it consumes 𝐊tail{\mathbf{K}}_{\mathrm{tail}}, 𝐘{\mathbf{Y}}, and 𝐔{\mathbf{U}} as already formed tensors.
items.zh: 第二个反向核通过式 51 传播 d​𝐒C\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{S}}_{C}。它在结构上也等价于 KDA 状态向量-雅可比积，因为它消耗已形成的张量 𝐊tail{\mathbf{K}}_{\mathrm{tail}}、𝐘{\mathbf{Y}} 和 𝐔{\mathbf{U}}。

items.en: The third backward kernel implements Eq. 64, Eq. 65, and Eq. 66. This is the main Gated DeltaNet-2 specific kernel. It accumulates d​𝐀\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{A}} with 𝐙⊤=(𝐖⊙𝐕)⊤{\mathbf{Z}}^{\top}=({\mathbf{W}}\odot{\mathbf{V}})^{\top} and 𝐄¯⊤=(𝜸⊙𝐁⊙𝐊)⊤\bar{{\mathbf{E}}}^{\top}=(\bm{\gamma}\odot{\mathbf{B}}\odot{\mathbf{K}})^{\top}. It also emits the direct gradients
items.zh: 第三个反向核实现式 64、式 65 和式 66。这是主要的 Gated DeltaNet-2 专用核。它使用 𝐙⊤=(𝐖⊙𝐕)⊤{\mathbf{Z}}^{\top}=({\mathbf{W}}\odot{\mathbf{V}})^{\top} 和 𝐄¯⊤=(𝜸⊙𝐁⊙𝐊)⊤\bar{{\mathbf{E}}}^{\top}=(\bm{\gamma}\odot{\mathbf{B}}\odot{\mathbf{K}})^{\top} 累积 d​𝐀\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{A}}。它还输出直接梯度

items.en: The erase-gate gradient has shape B×T×H×dkB\times T\times H\times d_{k}. The write-gate gradient has shape B×T×Hv×dvB\times T\times H_{v}\times d_{v}.
items.zh: 擦除门梯度的形状为 B×T×H×dkB\times T\times H\times d_{k}。写门梯度的形状为 B×T×Hv×dvB\times T\times H_{v}\times d_{v}。

items.en: The fourth backward kernel propagates through 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} and 𝐓{\mathbf{T}}. It adds the remaining contributions to d​𝐐\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{Q}}, d​𝐊\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{K}}, d​𝐁\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{B}}, and d​𝒈\mathrm{d}\bm{g}. The dependence on the cumulative decay is reduced by a reverse cumulative sum, as in Eq. 82.
items.zh: 第四个反向核通过 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} 和 𝐓{\mathbf{T}} 传播。它将剩余贡献添加到 d​𝐐\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{Q}}、d​𝐊\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{K}}、d​𝐁\mathrm{d}{\mathbf{B}} 和 d​𝒈\mathrm{d}\bm{g}。对累积衰减的依赖通过反向累积和减少，如式 82 所示。

full.secZh: C.4 自动调优与硬件调度

items.en: The fused WY backward kernel uses the same matrix shapes as the forward solve, but it has a denser set of live accumulators because it emits gradients for 𝐁{\mathbf{B}} and 𝐖{\mathbf{W}}. On Hopper GPUs we restrict the warp search for this kernel to two and four warps, since the eight-warp schedule can trigger a Triton WGMMA layout assertion for the 64×6464\times 64 accumulator. On Ampere GPUs the full search space is retained. This restriction changes only the schedule, not the mathematical operation.
items.zh: 融合的 WY 反向核使用与前向求解相同的矩阵形状，但它具有更密集的活动累加器集，因为它为 𝐁{\mathbf{B}} 和 𝐖{\mathbf{W}} 输出梯度。在 Hopper GPU 上，我们将此核的 warp 搜索限制为两个和四个 warp，因为八个 warp 调度可能触发 Triton WGMMA 布局断言（针对 64×6464\times 64 累加器）。在 Ampere GPU 上，保留完整的搜索空间。此限制仅改变调度，不改变数学运算。

items.en: A forward-only recurrent kernel is provided for autoregressive decoding at short sequence lengths. It applies Eq. 29 token by token. The kernel keeps the state in fp32, multiplies it by exp⁡(𝒈t)\exp(\bm{g}_{t}), reads the decayed state along 𝒃t⊙𝒌t{\bm{b}}_{t}\odot{\bm{k}}_{t}, writes 𝐰t⊙𝒗t\mathbf{w}_{t}\odot{\bm{v}}_{t} along 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t}, and returns 𝐒t⊤​𝒒t{\mathbf{S}}_{t}^{\top}{\bm{q}}_{t}. Training uses the chunk kernel.
items.zh: 提供了一个仅前向的循环核，用于短序列长度的自回归解码。它逐词元应用式 29。该核将状态保持在 fp32 中，将其乘以 exp⁡(𝒈t)\exp(\bm{g}_{t})，沿 𝒃t⊙𝒌t{\bm{b}}_{t}\odot{\bm{k}}_{t} 读取衰减后的状态，沿 𝒌t{\bm{k}}_{t} 写入 𝐰t⊙𝒗t\mathbf{w}_{t}\odot{\bm{v}}_{t}，并返回 𝐒t⊤​𝒒t{\mathbf{S}}_{t}^{\top}{\bm{q}}_{t}。训练使用块核。

items.en: Packed variable-length batches are represented with cumulative sequence lengths. The chunk index construction resets the recurrent state at every sequence boundary. The same layout is used by the chunk forward, the chunk backward, and the recurrent decoding kernel. Padding is removed before the layer and restored after the output projection.
items.zh: 打包的可变长度批次用累积序列长度表示。块索引构建在每个序列边界处重置循环状态。块前向、块反向和循环解码核使用相同的布局。填充在层之前被移除，并在输出投影之后恢复。

items.en: The decay gate in Eq. 86 is computed in explicit fp32 before entering the kernels. This is important because the local cumulative sum 𝑮r=∑i≤r𝒈i\bm{G}_{r}=\sum_{i\leq r}\bm{g}_{i} is a path-length-dependent quantity. A low precision mantissa can perturb long products of decays even when each tokenwise gate is small. The kernels therefore receive the log-decay tensor and only compute local cumulative sums and exponentials.
items.zh: 式 86 中的衰减门在进入核之前以显式 fp32 计算。这一点很重要，因为局部累积和 𝑮r=∑i≤r𝒈i\bm{G}_{r}=\sum_{i\leq r}\bm{g}_{i} 是一个依赖于路径长度的量。低精度尾数可能会扰动长衰减乘积，即使每个词元门很小。因此，核接收对数衰减张量，并仅计算局部累积和与指数。

items.en: Queries and keys are L2-normalized per head before the recurrent update. With normalized keys, 𝒌t​𝒌t⊤{\bm{k}}_{t}{\bm{k}}_{t}^{\top} is a projector in the tied-gate limit. In Gated DeltaNet-2, the erase factor is asymmetric, but normalization still stabilizes the scale of both 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} and 𝐓{\mathbf{T}}. The backward applies the standard L2-normalization vector-Jacobian product.
items.zh: 查询和键在循环更新之前按头进行 L2 归一化。使用归一化键时，在绑定门极限下，𝒌t​𝒌t⊤{\bm{k}}_{t}{\bm{k}}_{t}^{\top} 是一个投影算子。在 Gated DeltaNet-2 中，擦除因子是非对称的，但归一化仍然稳定了 𝐀q​k{\mathbf{A}}_{qk} 和 𝐓{\mathbf{T}} 的尺度。反向应用标准的 L2 归一化向量-雅可比积。

full.secZh: D.3 状态与累加器数据类型

items.en: The recurrent state is stored in fp32 across chunks and during recurrent decoding. Matrix multiplication accumulators use fp32. The layer output is cast back to the model dtype at the kernel boundary. The WY auxiliaries may be stored in the model dtype after fp32 accumulation, since they are recomputed when the memory-saving training path is used.
items.zh: 循环状态在块间和循环解码期间以 fp32 存储。矩阵乘法累加器使用 fp32。层输出在核边界处转换回模型数据类型。WY 辅助量在 fp32 累积后可以以模型数据类型存储，因为在使用节省内存的训练路径时会重新计算它们。

items.en: The triangular solve for 𝐀=(𝐈+𝐓)−1{\mathbf{A}}=({\mathbf{I}}+{\mathbf{T}})^{-1} is the most precision-sensitive part of the chunk computation. Errors in this solve are propagated through dependent forward-substitution steps. The implementation therefore exposes an explicit precision flag for the solve. The conservative IEEE fp32 path is used when required by the hardware check, while the remaining matrix products can use the faster tensor-core path.
items.zh: 求解 𝐀=(𝐈+𝐓)−1{\mathbf{A}}=({\mathbf{I}}+{\mathbf{T}})^{-1} 的三角求解是块计算中对精度最敏感的部分。该求解中的误差会通过依赖的前向代入步骤传播。因此，实现为求解暴露了一个显式的精度标志。当硬件检查要求时，使用保守的 IEEE fp32 路径，而其余矩阵乘积可以使用更快的张量核心路径。

items.en: All linear layers are initialized with Xavier uniform weights and gain 2−2.52^{-2.5}. Biases are initialized to zero when present. After the attention computation, the output is passed through an RMSNorm and SiLU gate before the final output projection. These choices match the training recipe used for the Gated DeltaNet family and keep the early recurrent state magnitudes controlled.
items.zh: 所有线性层使用 Xavier 均匀权重和增益 2−2.52^{-2.5} 初始化。偏置在存在时初始化为零。在注意力计算之后，输出在最终输出投影之前通过 RMSNorm 和 SiLU 门。这些选择与 Gated DeltaNet 系列使用的训练配方一致，并保持早期循环状态幅度可控。

items.en: We verified the chunkwise forward against a tokenwise recurrent reference for random configurations covering different sequence lengths, head counts, key dimensions, value dimensions, initial states, packed layouts, and dtypes. We verified the backward against autograd through the recurrent reference. In fp64 reference tests, gradients for 𝐐{\mathbf{Q}}, 𝐊{\mathbf{K}}, 𝐕{\mathbf{V}}, 𝐁{\mathbf{B}}, 𝐖{\mathbf{W}}, the log-decay, and the initial state agree to machine precision. In production fp32, differences are at the expected tensor-core accumulation noise level. In bfloat16, the error follows the bfloat16 mantissa.
items.zh: 我们针对覆盖不同序列长度、头数、键维度、值维度、初始状态、打包布局和数据类型的随机配置，将块前向与逐词元循环参考进行了验证。我们通过循环参考的自动求导验证了反向。在 fp64 参考测试中，𝐐{\mathbf{Q}}、𝐊{\mathbf{K}}、𝐕{\mathbf{V}}、𝐁{\mathbf{B}}、𝐖{\mathbf{W}}、对数衰减和初始状态的梯度与机器精度一致。在生产 fp32 中，差异处于预期的张量核心累积噪声水平。在 bfloat16 中，误差遵循 bfloat16 尾数。

items.en: We evaluate Gated DeltaNet-2 against a Transformer baseline and recent recurrent architectures, including Mamba-2 [8], Gated DeltaNet [11], Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) [12], and Mamba-3 [13]. For each recurrent architecture, we train a recurrent-only model and a hybrid model. The hybrid model follows Section 3.5, using the same recurrent token mixer together with sliding-window attention (SWA) under the same residual block structure. For Mamba-3, we evaluate both SISO and MIMO variants. The Mamba-3 MIMO model uses rank R=4R=4.
items.zh: 我们将 Gated DeltaNet-2 与 Transformer 基线以及最近的循环架构进行了评估，包括 Mamba-2 [8]、Gated DeltaNet [11]、Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) [12] 和 Mamba-3 [13]。对于每种循环架构，我们训练了一个纯循环模型和一个混合模型。混合模型遵循第 3.5 节，在相同的残差块结构下使用相同的循环词元混合器以及滑动窗口注意力 (SWA)。对于 Mamba-3，我们评估了 SISO 和 MIMO 变体。Mamba-3 MIMO 模型使用秩 R=4R=4。

items.en: For fair recurrent comparisons, we match both parameter count and main recurrent state size. Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Gated DeltaNet-2 use H=16H=16 heads with dk=128d_{k}=128 and dv=128d_{v}=128, giving a per-layer recurrent state of
items.zh: 为了公平的循环比较，我们匹配了参数数量和主要循环状态大小。Gated DeltaNet、KDA 和 Gated DeltaNet-2 使用 H=16H=16 个头，dk=128d_{k}=128 和 dv=128d_{v}=128，每层循环状态为

items.en: floats per batch element. Since dmodel=2048d_{\mathrm{model}}=2048, this equals 128​dmodel128d_{\mathrm{model}}. For Mamba-2 and Mamba-3, we use expansion factor 22 and head dimension 6464, and set dstate=64d_{\mathrm{state}}=64. Their main recurrent state size is therefore
items.zh: 每个批次元素的浮点数。由于 dmodel=2048d_{\mathrm{model}}=2048，这等于 128​dmodel128d_{\mathrm{model}}。对于 Mamba-2 和 Mamba-3，我们使用扩展因子 22 和头维度 6464，并设置 dstate=64d_{\mathrm{state}}=64。因此它们的主要循环状态大小为

items.en: Mamba-3 MIMO keeps the same main recurrent state size as the SISO variant while adding the rank-RR MIMO parameterization.
items.zh: Mamba-3 MIMO 在保持与 SISO 变体相同的主循环状态大小的同时，增加了秩-RR MIMO 参数化。

items.en: Unless stated otherwise, all models have 1.3B parameters and are trained on 100B tokens sampled from FineWeb-Edu [26]. We use AdamW with peak learning rate 4×10−44\times 10^{-4}, weight decay 0.10.1, and gradient clipping at 1.01.0. The learning rate follows cosine annealing with a 1B-token warm-up. The global batch size is 0.5M tokens. The training sequence length is 4K tokens. Hybrid models use a 2K SWA window.
items.zh: 除非另有说明，所有模型均具有 1.3B 参数，并在从 FineWeb-Edu [26] 采样的 100B 词元上训练。我们使用 AdamW，峰值学习率为 4×10⁻⁴，权重衰减为 0.1，梯度裁剪为 1.0。学习率遵循余弦退火，并包含 1B 词元的预热。全局批大小为 0.5M 词元。训练序列长度为 4K 词元。混合模型使用 2K SWA 窗口。

items.en: We use the evaluation suite commonly adopted for pretrained recurrent language models [41]. Language modeling quality is measured by perplexity on WikiText [Wiki. 27] and LAMBADA [LMB. 28]. For zero-shot transfer, we report LAMBADA accuracy together with PIQA [29], HellaSwag [Hella. 30], WinoGrande [Wino. 31], ARC-Easy and ARC-Challenge [ARC-e and ARC-c 32], OpenBookQA [OBQA 33], Social IQa [SIQA 34], and BoolQ [35]. This mix covers next-token prediction, physical and social reasoning, commonsense completion, and elementary science QA.
items.zh: 我们采用预训练循环语言模型常用的评估套件 [41]。语言建模质量通过 WikiText [Wiki. 27] 和 LAMBADA [LMB. 28] 上的困惑度来衡量。对于零样本迁移，我们报告 LAMBADA 准确率以及 PIQA [29]、HellaSwag [Hella. 30]、WinoGrande [Wino. 31]、ARC-Easy 和 ARC-Challenge [ARC-e 和 ARC-c 32]、OpenBookQA [OBQA 33]、Social IQa [SIQA 34] 和 BoolQ [35]。这一组合涵盖下一个词预测、物理和社会推理、常识补全以及基础科学问答。

items.en: We evaluate retrieval in both controlled synthetic settings and real-data settings. For synthetic retrieval, we use Single Needle-In-A-Haystack (S-NIAH) and Multi-Key Needle-In-A-Haystack (MK-NIAH) tasks from RULER [36]. The S-NIAH suite contains three progressively harder cases. S-NIAH-1 is passkey retrieval, S-NIAH-2 asks for a numerical needle, and S-NIAH-3 asks for a word-based needle. We additionally evaluate MK-NIAH-1 where several distractor key-value pairs are present and the model must return the value associated with one requested key.
items.zh: 我们在受控合成设置和真实数据设置中评估检索。对于合成检索，我们使用 RULER [36] 中的单针大海捞针（S-NIAH）和多键大海捞针（MK-NIAH）任务。S-NIAH 套件包含三个逐渐变难的案例。S-NIAH-1 是密码检索，S-NIAH-2 要求检索数字针，S-NIAH-3 要求检索基于词的针。我们还评估了 MK-NIAH-1，其中存在多个干扰键值对，模型必须返回与一个请求键关联的值。

items.en: For real-world retrieval, we follow [37]. The suite includes SWDE [46] for structured relation extraction from HTML, FDA [47] for key-value retrieval from PDFs, and question-answering datasets including SQuAD [48], TriviaQA [49], DROP [50], and Natural Questions [51].
items.zh: 对于真实世界检索，我们遵循 [37]。该套件包括用于从 HTML 中提取结构化关系的 SWDE [46]、用于从 PDF 中检索键值对的 FDA [47]，以及问答数据集，包括 SQuAD [48]、TriviaQA [49]、DROP [50] 和 Natural Questions [51]。
